历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 3969 (including gap factors), in 2023 about 202, in 2024 about 170, and in 2025 for physics category about 134, showing a continuous forward trend over the past three years, with a 2025 baseline of about 134; the university's enrollment plan for science in Ningxia was 23 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 20 for physics category in 2025; the 2026 physics category plan is only 3, a sharp reduction of about 85% compared to 2025, and the extreme reduction in slots will significantly increase competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 14th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with rankings continuously rising in recent years (19th in 2021 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026), indicating the university's comprehensive strength and reputation are in the top tier of the country; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents, but Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, and overall application attention has not significantly decreased; no historical enrollment gap records; Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering are A+, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering are A, with a total of 12 A- and above disciplines, outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the current hot fields of electronic information/communication, computer, electrical engineering, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors maintain high social popularity in 2026, highly aligned with BIT's advantageous disciplines, further strengthening application appeal; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, basically the same as 2025, with a stable competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of rankings over the past three years, the sharp reduction of physics category slots from 20 to 3 in 2026 (85% reduction) leading to extreme scarcity, the university's top engineering strength and high popularity of majors, slightly negative reputation but undiminished Douyin attention, it is expected that competition in the 2026 science group will be extremely fierce; predicted minimum rank about 86, range 36-136.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, only 3 students will be admitted in the physics category, with extreme scarcity of slots. Rankings within the predicted range (36-136) are all at a very high competition level. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (136) can try to sprint, but need to prepare backup plans; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (36) have a greater chance. Since each major only recruits 1 person, the choice of majors is extremely limited, so it is recommended to prioritize the university level.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 235; in 2023, approximately 2014 (including a significant gap factor); in 2024, approximately 335; in 2025, the history category was approximately 267. Excluding the 2023 gap anomaly, the rankings in the past two years fluctuated between 267 and 335, with a baseline of approximately 267 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Ningxia was 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 15 for the history category in 2025. In 2026, the history category plan is 17, a slight expansion of about 13.3% compared to 2025, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 14th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, placing it in the top tier of domestic comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms. No historical record of enrollment gaps. BIT is known for engineering, with related liberal arts disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A). The Social Sciences Experimental Class (Management and Economics direction) can benefit from the advantages of management disciplines. There are no directly corresponding A-class disciplines in the humanities and social sciences, making the overall appeal of liberal arts relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for liberal arts-related majors such as accounting/finance/auditing, finance/banking/economics shows a divided and wait-and-see attitude, with overall popularity lower than that of engineering. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is approximately 66,000, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking fluctuation trends of the past two years, the slight expansion of the history category plan in 2026 (+13.3%), BIT's relatively weaker liberal arts strength compared to engineering, a somewhat negative reputation but undiminished attention, it is expected that competition in the 2026 liberal arts group will be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 298, with a range of 248 to 348.
